[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a cartoon character with a raised blue hand and a wide-open mouth, with large bold text overlaid in the foreground.

Main Subject:
A stylized, pink cartoon figure stands centered, with thick black lines for facial features, a red mouth interior with white teeth, and a small nose area. It has large black eyebrows and a look of shock or alarm. A bright green block-like object with a gray, U-shaped face mark sits in front of the character’s torso, partially covering the lower body. One arm is raised behind the character’s head, showing a blue, curved hand or appendage. The background includes a large dark blue area with lighter specks.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a stylized outdoor or night environment with a dark blue sky-like background and a blurred, layered landscape or structure in the lower portion. The time of day appears unclear but looks like nighttime due to the dark tones.

Visual Details:
Colors are dominated by dark blue, pink, bright green, and white. Lighting is graphic and high-contrast, with flat shading and thick outlines. The camera view is front-facing and centered on the character, with the head and raised hand taking up the top half of the composition. Text overlays cover the top and bottom: the top word is large and centered, and the bottom word spans across the width of the image. A faint “Meta AI” watermark appears on the right side near the lower area.

Visible Text:
MAMAH
ADAJOMOK
Meta AI

Practical Summary:
A cartoon-style pink character with an alarmed face and a raised blue hand is shown over a dark blue night-like background. Large text reads “MAMAH” and “ADAJOMOK,” with a faint “Meta AI” watermark on the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

MAMAH  
ADA JOMOK  
[unclear] Eta AI

# Structured Version

- **MAMAH**
- **ADa JOMOK**  
- **Eta AI** `[unclear]` (partially visible)  

# Notes

- The text **“Eta AI”** appears small and partially obscured; exact punctuation/case may be `[unclear]`.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
